reasoning: Experience: 12+ years in software development (exceeds the 6+ years requirement). Most recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz) align with full-stack development using TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, matching the primary stack. Earlier roles include backend (Dlang, Java, C++) and frontend (Ember.js, React) work.
AI Agent Development: Recent experience at re:cinq includes contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which aligns with the 'AI agent development' requirement.
Cloud/Containerization: Experience with AWS CDK (Optilyz) and Kubernetes (GISCollective) covers cloud and containerization needs.
Testing: Mentions TDD, CI/CD, and has experience with testing frameworks (e.g., Selenium course, Vitest not explicitly listed but Jest is).

Full-Stack Coverage: Experience spans frontend (React, Ember.js), backend (Node.js, Nest.js not explicitly listed but TypeScript/Node.js is close), databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL/MySQL not explicitly listed but SQL is), and DevOps (Docker, GitLab CI).

Gaps: Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned in the resume, though TypeScript/Node.js is covered. Kotlin/Java are secondary skills and not prominently featured in recent roles. Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) are partially covered (AWS CDK, Kubernetes).
Education: Bachelor's in Computer Science meets the core qualification.
Soft Skills: Mentions collaboration, communication, and user-focused development (e.g., GISCollective for NGOs).
Security: No explicit mention of authentication/authorization experience, which is a required skill.
Scalability: Experience with high-performance apps (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby) and real-time systems (DLang, Asynchronous I/O) suggests scalability knowledge.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack development experience with a strong match to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB).
Recent experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligning with the 'AI agent development' requirement.
Proven track record in cloud and containerization (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and DevOps practices (CI/CD, Docker).
concerns: Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned in the resume, though TypeScript/Node.js experience is strong.
Kotlin/Java are secondary skills and not prominently featured in recent roles, which may limit depth in these areas.
No explicit mention of authentication/authorization security best practices in the resume.
response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong match to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and recent work in AI-agent infrastructure, which is a critical requirement. Cloud and containerization experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) is also strong. Gaps include limited explicit mention of Nest.js and security best practices, but the overall fit is excellent given the years of experience and breadth of skills.
